name: Maximum Subarray Sum
description: Given an array of N integers, find the maximum possible sum of a contiguous subarray.
inputFormat: Second line contains N space-separated integers

sampleTestCases.explanation: The subarray [1, 2, 3, -2, 5] has sum 9, which is the maximum. Kadane's algorithm picks all elements since the total is optimal.
All elements are negative. The maximum subarray sum is the least-negative element, which is -1 (single element subarray).
